SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2

Class SMTHandlerServices

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SMTHandlerServices
public class SMTHandlerServices extends Object
This class provides some infrastructure to the smt translation process. In particular, it collects the preamble and the snippets for the handlers such that they need not be read from disk multiple times. This class is a singleton.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static SMTHandlerServices getInstance()
      Get the instance of this singleton.
      Returns:
      non-null instance of this class. Always the same.

    • getTemplateHandlers

      public Collection<SMTHandler> getTemplateHandlers(String[] handlerNames) throws IOException
      Load the original/template SMTHandler instances (from the snippetMap) of all handlers specified as arguments. Add fresh handlers to the snippetMap and load the snippets that belong to these instances if that has not happened yet for any object of a given handler class. Caution: Do not call this method too often since it may add to the static map of instances to snippets. It would be a good idea to call this method (at most) once for each solver type with a custom array of handler names. An empty handlerNames list leads to the usage of the handlers defined by defaultHandlers.txt.
      Parameters:
      handlerNames - a non-null list of non-null strings with class names (s. above)
      Returns:
      a fresh collection containing only the original SMTHandlers from the snippetMap's key set that match the given handler names. The collection's order matches that of the names as well.
      Throws:
      IOException - if loading the snippet Properties for a handler class fails

    • getFreshHandlers

      public List<SMTHandler> getFreshHandlers(Services services, @NonNull String[] handlerNames, String[] handlerOptions, MasterHandler mh) throws IOException
      Get a copy of freshly created SMTHandlers by cloning the reference handlers. They can be used to translate problems to SMT.
      Parameters:
      services - passed on to the handlers for initialisation
      handlerNames - the fully classified class names of the SMTHandlers to be used If this is empty or null, all existing handlers will be used.
      handlerOptions - arbitrary String options for the SMTHandlers
      mh - passed on to the handlers for initialisation
      Returns:
      a freshly created list of freshly created handlers
      Throws:
      IOException - if the resources cannot be read

    • getPreamble

      public String getPreamble()
      There is a fixed SMT2lib preamble first sent to the solver. Get this preamble.
      Returns:
      a non-null string, always the same

    • getSMTProperties

      public Collection<SMTHandlerProperty<?>> getSMTProperties() throws IOException
      Get the list of all SMTHandlerPropertys *currently* known in the system. Note that new smt properties may be added after calling the method so that it has to be called again.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable view on the smt properties, not null
      Throws:
      IOException - if resources cannot be read
